creator: gcw@zsh.org
text:
shells/zsh/Makefile should have MASTER_SITES updated.
archive.progeny.com has been decomissioned
sunsite.dk is the same as mirrors.dotsrc.org

Sites with bigger pipes should be listed first:
e.g.
http://zsh.open-mirror.com/
http://mirrors.dotsrc.org/zsh/
ftp://ftp.demon.nl/pub/mirrors/zsh/
